rationale: Review 1 correctly finds zero reuse/duplication issues (material is new; Mathlib APIs like adjoin_le_iff/attachFin/sq_sqrt are used directly). Review 2's two findings (lines 57/62 wrappers being rfl) are stylistic nits unrelated to reuse, not material, and removing them yields an equivalent or worse PR; a sound approve beats demanding needless edits.
